ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF with clear content. All fields are legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF with clear content. All fields are legible. Contains some French text (origin declaration).

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks section contains 'ORDER REF: 2721' and 'INVOICE N° 1003009' — neither constitutes an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar is present.

occurrences_in_invoice.context: Company logo/branding at top of invoice

occurrences_in_invoice.location: Invoice page 1 - Seller block (bottom of page)
occurrences_in_invoice.context: Seller address block: Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4e, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden

consignor_search_all_files.conclusion: Consignor name 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' found in multiple locations in the invoice file.

pairing_validation.reasoning: All three pairing criteria are met: (1) Certificate references invoice no. 1003009, which matches the invoice's number. (2) Consignor 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' is identified in the invoice as the Seller. (3) Consignee 'NAPACK' is identified in the invoice as both Buyer and Consignee.

candidates.raw_text: 4 RUE NABEUL ZONE INDUSTRIELLE MGHIRA II, 2082 FOUCHANA, BEN AROUS
candidates.normalized_text: 4 rue nabeul zone industrielle mghira ii, 2082 fouchana, ben arous

candidates.raw_text: 4 rue Nabeul, zone industrielle mghira II, 2082 Fouchana, Tunisia
candidates.normalized_text: 4 rue nabeul, zone industrielle mghira ii, 2082 fouchana, tunisia

candidates.raw_text: 4 rue Nabeul, zone industrielle mghira II, 2082 Fouchana, Tunisia
candidates.normalized_text: 4 rue nabeul, zone industrielle mghira ii, 2082 fouchana, tunisia

candidates.raw_text: Nous certifions que les marchandises faisant lobjet de cette livraison sont d´origine français et que la valeur indiquée est juste et conforme à nos écritures.
The exporter of the products covered by this document (customs authorization No: SE/TTA/042618) declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of EU preferential origin.

checkpoints.certificate_value: FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB, KUNGSPORTEN 4E, SE-427 50, BILLDAL, SWEDEN
checkpoints.invoice_value: Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4e, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden (Seller block)

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.0 - Koncernstruktur / Name search in all files
comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' across all invoice pages
comparison_steps.detail: Name found in: (1) Invoice header/branding 'FORPAC international ab.', (2) Seller block 'Forpac International AB', (3) Stamp area 'FORPAC international ab.'

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor name with invoice seller name
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' → normalized: 'forpac international ab'. Invoice Seller: 'Forpac International AB' → normalized: 'forpac international ab'. Exact match after case normalization.
Certificate: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice Seller block: 'Sweden'. Exact match after case normalization. Additionally confirmed by VAT number prefix 'SE' (SE556598155101).

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found explicitly in invoice seller block and header
Indirect country verification via VAT prefix SE

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' at 'KUNGSPORTEN 4E, SE-427 50, BILLDAL, SWEDEN'. Invoice seller block at bottom of page 1 shows 'Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4e, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden'. After normalization of case, the company names are identical. The address matches (Kungsporten 4E/4e, 427 50 Billdal). Country 'SWEDEN' matches 'Sweden'. VAT number SE556598155101 confirms Swedish registration. No other seller/party in the invoice could be confused. MATCH per 4.1.0 and 4.1.2/4.1.4.

checkpoints.certificate_value: NAPACK, 4 RUE NABEUL ZONE INDUSTRIELLE MGHIRA II, 2082 FOUCHANA, BEN AROUS, Tunisia
checkpoints.invoice_value: NAPACK, 4 rue Nabeul, zone industrielle mghira II, 2082 Fouchana, Tunisia (Buyer block); NAPACK, 4 rue Nabeul, zone industrielle mghira II, 2082 Fouchana, Tunisia (Consignee block)

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice has explicit 'Buyer' field with 'NAPACK' and explicit 'Consignee' field with 'NAPACK'. Both are primary fields per 4.2.0.2.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice buyer/consignee name
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'NAPACK' → normalized: 'napack'. Invoice Buyer: 'NAPACK' → normalized: 'napack'. Invoice Consignee: 'NAPACK' → normalized: 'napack'. Exact match.
Certificate: 'Tunisia'. Invoice Buyer block: 'Tunisia'. Invoice Consignee block: 'Tunisia'. Exact match after case normalization.

rules_applied.description: Priority identification - Buyer field is primary billing field
Name verification - exact match after normalization

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'NAPACK' at '4 RUE NABEUL ZONE INDUSTRIELLE MGHIRA II, 2082 FOUCHANA, BEN AROUS, Tunisia'. Invoice Buyer block shows 'NAPACK, 4 rue Nabeul, zone industrielle mghira II, 2082 Fouchana, Tunisia'. Invoice also has a dedicated Consignee block showing 'NAPACK' at same address in Tunisia. Company name 'NAPACK' exactly matches after case normalization. Address is consistent (4 rue Nabeul, zone industrielle mghira II, 2082 Fouchana). Certificate includes 'BEN AROUS' which is additional regional information not present in invoice — this is additional info in certificate, not a contradiction. Country Tunisia matches. MATCH per 4.2.2 and 4.2.3.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: BEN AROUS in certificate but not in invoice could indicate different address
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: BEN AROUS is a governorate/region in Tunisia. The core address (4 rue Nabeul, zone industrielle mghira II, 2082 Fouchana) matches. Additional regional detail in certificate does not contradict invoice. Per 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country match.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Line 1: 'Fluting de 80 a 115gsm. rw:200 a 250cm' (53 Reel); Line 2: 'TL3 80 a 115gsm. rw:200 a 250cm' (20 Reel); Total: 73 Reel

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate does not contain article numbers. Proceeding to Priority 2 (text matching).

Certificate uses 'FLUTING'. Invoice line 1 description: 'Fluting de 80 a 115gsm. rw:200 a 250cm'. The word 'Fluting' is present as the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning. Match after case normalization.

Certificate uses 'TESTLINER'. Invoice line 2 description: 'TL3 80 a 115gsm. rw:200 a 250cm'. The word 'TESTLINER' does NOT appear in the invoice. 'TL3' is a code/abbreviation. However, rule 4.3.3.3 (Kortbeteckning för varutyp) applies: the invoice uses a code 'TL3' in the same product context (same paper product table, same specifications format) where certificate uses 'TESTLINER'. This requires industry knowledge to confirm. Evaluating 4.3.3.3 conditions.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3.3 - Kortbeteckning evaluation for TL3 vs TESTLINER
comparison_steps.description: Evaluate if TL3 is a short code for Testliner
comparison_steps.detail: Before applying 4.3.3.3 (which would give MANUAL_REVIEW), checking Priority 3 (4.3.5): Certificate contains invoice reference 'INVOICE N° 1003009' in remarks. This matches invoice no. 1003009. Evaluating if generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens applies.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains general goods description 'FLUTING & TESTLINER' with invoice reference N° 1003009
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate states 'INVOICE N° 1003009' in remarks box. Invoice number is 1003009. The certificate's goods description 'FLUTING & TESTLINER' is a general/category-level description. The invoice contains paper products (Fluting and TL3/Testliner) which are consistent with this description. The invoice's contents are compatible with the certificate's description. However, there is no explicit phrase like 'according to attached invoice'. Evaluating strictly: the certificate lists the invoice number and describes the goods at a category level. The invoice's first line explicitly contains 'Fluting'. For the second line, 'TL3' is an abbreviation in the paper industry for Testliner. Applying 4.3.3 directly: 'FLUTING' is found. For 'TESTLINER', applying 4.3.3.3: TL3 is a short code used in same product context (paper rolls, same gsm specifications), the abbreviation 'TL' clearly relates to 'Testliner' as a paper grade code. Per 4.3.3.3, this gives MANUAL_REVIEW — however, re-evaluating the full context.

comparison_steps.step: Re-evaluation of FLUTING match and overall goods description
comparison_steps.description: Assessing whether the overall goods description can be verified
comparison_steps.detail: FLUTING: directly found in invoice line 1 as 'Fluting' → MATCH. TESTLINER vs TL3: Per rule 4.3.3.3, 'TL3' is a code used in the same product table context (paper rolls, reelwidth, gsm). The certificate uses the full product name 'TESTLINER', the invoice uses the code 'TL3'. Per 4.3.3.3, this should be MANUAL_REVIEW. However, the total quantity (73 Reels = 53 + 20) confirms the same shipment. Additionally, the invoice number reference matches. Given that FLUTING matches directly and TL3 is in the same product family context, but strictly per rules, 4.3.3.3 gives MANUAL_REVIEW for the TL3/TESTLINER component. This would make the checkpoint MANUAL_REVIEW. BUT — re-reading 4.3.3.3 more carefully: it says the result shall NEVER be MATCH — only MANUAL_REVIEW. So the TESTLINER ↔ TL3 comparison per 4.3.3.3 gives MANUAL_REVIEW.

rules_applied.description: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning - FLUTING found directly in invoice
Kortbeteckning för varutyp - TL3 in invoice vs TESTLINER in certificate. Same product context (paper rolls, same specification format).
Non-identity-bearing additions (specifications like gsm, reelwidth) do not affect identity

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: 'TOTAL 73 REELS / FLUTING & TESTLINER'. Invoice has two product lines: (1) 'Fluting de 80 a 115gsm. rw:200 a 250cm' for 53 Reel and (2) 'TL3 80 a 115gsm. rw:200 a 250cm' for 20 Reel, totaling 73 Reel. 'FLUTING' can be directly identified in invoice line 1 → MATCH per 4.3.3. 'TESTLINER' cannot be directly found in the invoice — the invoice uses 'TL3' which is a paper industry code. Per 4.3.3.3, since the certificate uses a full product name and the invoice uses a code in the same product context (same table, same specification format for paper rolls), the result for TESTLINER should be MANUAL_REVIEW. However — reconsidering the overall picture: The certificate references invoice 1003009 explicitly. The total 73 REELS matches exactly. FLUTING is directly found. The only issue is 'TL3' vs 'TESTLINER'. Per strict rules 4.3.3.3, this is MANUAL_REVIEW. But let me reconsider whether 4.3.5 (generell varubeskrivning) applies. The certificate says 'INVOICE N° 1003009' but does NOT contain an explicit phrase like 'according to attached invoice' or 'as per invoice'. Rule 4.3.5 requires an 'uttrycklig hänvisning' such as 'according to attached invoice', 'as per invoice', or 'see attached invoice'. The certificate only states 'INVOICE N° 1003009' without such a connecting phrase. Therefore 4.3.5 is NOT applicable. Final conclusion: FLUTING matches, TESTLINER vs TL3 triggers 4.3.3.3 → MANUAL_REVIEW for this checkpoint.

rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.3.5 requires an explicit connecting phrase such as 'according to attached invoice', 'as per invoice', or 'see attached invoice'. The certificate only states 'INVOICE N° 1003009' without such a phrase. Therefore 4.3.5 is not applicable.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: TL3 is a direct match for TESTLINER via normalization
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: TL3 is a code/abbreviation, not a direct text match or normalization of TESTLINER. Standard normalization rules do not cover industry-specific code-to-name translations.

comparison_steps.description: Verify certificate contains numeric value and unit
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate box 7: '187,905 MT/GW'. Numeric value: 187.905 (using comma as decimal separator, European notation). Unit: MT. Weight category: GW (Gross Weight). All required elements present.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '187,905 MT/GW' — this is the verification quantity
comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 value '187,905 MT/GW' is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet. Box 6 also mentions 'TOTAL 73 REELS' — this is a secondary quantity (count of packages).
Invoice total qty row at bottom of page: '73 Reel 187,905 MT'. The numeric value 187,905 (= 187.905 in decimal notation) matches exactly. The unit MT matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate specifies GW. Invoice total line shows '187,905 MT' without explicit GW/NW designation
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 187,905 MT/GW (Gross Weight). Invoice total: 187,905 MT (no GW/NW specified on total line). However, invoice product lines show 133,827 MT and 54,078 MT which sum to 187,905 MT. The column header is 'Quantity MT' without GW/NW. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate has ONE weight value without multiple weight categories, and this value can be identified in invoice with no contradicting alternative weight value of different category. The invoice does not contain a separate NW value. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2 → MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Certificate contains numeric value (187.905) and unit (MT) with weight category (GW)
Box 7 value is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet
Förekomstkontroll - 187,905 MT found in invoice total line
Weight category - certificate says GW, invoice has single weight value without contradicting NW

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: '187,905 MT/GW'. This is interpreted as 187.905 metric tons gross weight (European comma-as-decimal notation). Invoice total quantity row shows '73 Reel 187,905 MT'. The numeric value 187,905 (187.905) matches exactly. The unit MT matches. Regarding weight category: the certificate specifies GW, but the invoice total line only shows 'MT' without GW/NW. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, when the certificate has a single weight value and it can be identified in the invoice, and the invoice does NOT contain a contradicting alternative weight value of different category (no separate NW total exists) → MATCH. Additionally, the secondary quantity '73 REELS' from box 6 matches '73 Reel' in the invoice total, providing further corroboration but not required for the primary verification.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: 187,905 could be 187905 (using comma as thousands separator)
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: In the context of MT (metric tons) for 73 reels of paper, 187.905 MT (approximately 188 tonnes) is a reasonable weight. 187,905 MT (nearly 188,000 tonnes) would be unreasonable for 73 reels of paper. The invoice uses the same notation '187,905 MT' confirming decimal interpretation.

checkpoints.invoice_value: France (Country of origin field); EU preferential origin (exporter declaration)

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin indication in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: France' in the delivery terms section. Additionally, the invoice contains a French-language declaration 'Nous certifions que les marchandises faisant lobjet de cette livraison sont d´origine français' confirming French origin. The exporter declaration also states 'products are of EU preferential origin'.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin with invoice origin
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'FRANCE'. Invoice: 'France'. Exact match after case normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Check if EU normalization is relevant
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate explicitly states 'FRANCE' (not EU). Invoice states 'France'. Direct country match — no EU normalization needed. France is an EU member state, consistent with the EU preferential origin declaration in the invoice.

rules_applied.description: Origin identification - 'Country of origin: France' found in invoice
Normalization - FRANCE → france matches France → france
MATCH determination - origin explicitly identified in invoice

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'FRANCE' as country of origin. Invoice has an explicit field 'Country of origin: France' — this is a direct, explicit origin field. After case normalization: 'france' = 'france'. MATCH. Additionally corroborated by French-language origin declaration and EU preferential origin statement in the invoice. No contradicting origin information found anywhere in the invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
Document A is certificate (Certificate of Origin, ICC format). Document B is invoice. Single certificate, single invoice. Invoice no. 1003009 matches certificate reference.
All three criteria met: invoice number match (1003009), consignor identified (Forpac International AB), consignee identified (NAPACK).

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.detail: FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB found in invoice seller block, header branding, and stamp area.
Exact name match after case normalization.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Indirect country verification via VAT prefix
rule_evaluation_log.detail: VAT SE556598155101 confirms Sweden.
SWEDEN = Sweden.
Buyer field (primary) contains NAPACK. Consignee field also contains NAPACK.
NAPACK = NAPACK.
Tunisia = Tunisia.
No article numbers in certificate.
'FLUTING' found as 'Fluting' in invoice line 1.
'TESTLINER' not found in invoice. Invoice uses 'TL3' instead.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Kortbeteckning för varutyp - TL3 vs TESTLINER
rule_evaluation_log.detail: TL3 is a short code in same product context (paper rolls table). Certificate uses full name TESTLINER. Per 4.3.3.3 this gives MANUAL_REVIEW, never MATCH.
Certificate states 'INVOICE N° 1003009' but lacks explicit connecting phrase ('according to attached invoice', 'as per invoice', etc.). Rule 4.3.5 requires such a phrase.
187,905 MT/GW — numeric value, unit, and weight category all present.
187,905 MT/GW from box 7.
Found in invoice total line: 73 Reel 187,905 MT.
Certificate GW, invoice has single value without contradicting NW. Per point 2 → MATCH.
'Country of origin: France' found in invoice.
FRANCE = France after case normalization.
Origin explicitly verified.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Avsändare, mottagare, kvantitet och ursprungsland stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dock kan inte hela varubeskrivningen verifieras fullt ut: certifikatet anger 'FLUTING & TESTLINER' men fakturan använder koden 'TL3' istället för 'TESTLINER'. Koden förekommer i samma produktkontext (pappersrullar) men kräver manuell bedömning för att säkerställa att det avser samma vara.

determining_checkpoints.impact: TESTLINER in certificate cannot be directly matched to TL3 in invoice. Rule 4.3.3.3 (short code for product type) applies, giving MANUAL_REVIEW.

blocking_reasons: Goods description checkpoint requires manual review: 'TESTLINER' vs 'TL3' code in invoice (rule 4.3.3.3)

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair_summary: Certifikat SEG-26D-464425 (utfärdat 2026-02-26) verifierat mot faktura 1003009 (daterad 2026-02-26). Avsändare: FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB, Sverige. Mottagare: NAPACK, Tunisien.

sections.certificate_value: FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB, KUNGSPORTEN 4E, SE-427 50, BILLDAL, SWEDEN
sections.invoice_value: Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4e, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans Seller-block som 'Forpac International AB' efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Adressen överensstämmer (Kungsporten 4E/4e, 427 50 Billdal). Land 'SWEDEN' matchar 'Sweden'. Ytterligare bekräftas via VAT-nummer SE556598155101 (prefix SE verifierar Sverige).

sections.certificate_value: NAPACK, 4 RUE NABEUL ZONE INDUSTRIELLE MGHIRA II, 2082 FOUCHANA, BEN AROUS, Tunisia
sections.invoice_value: NAPACK, 4 rue Nabeul, zone industrielle mghira II, 2082 Fouchana, Tunisia (Buyer & Consignee)
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning mot Buyer/Consignee-fält med landverifiering
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'NAPACK' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans Buyer-fält och Consignee-fält. Adressen överensstämmer (4 rue Nabeul, zone industrielle mghira II, 2082 Fouchana). Certifikatet anger ytterligare 'BEN AROUS' (ett governorat i Tunisien) som saknas i fakturan — detta är ytterligare regional information i certifikatet, ingen motsägelse. Land 'Tunisia' matchar 'Tunisia'.

sections.invoice_value: Linje 1: 'Fluting de 80 a 115gsm. rw:200 a 250cm' (53 Reel); Linje 2: 'TL3 80 a 115gsm. rw:200 a 250cm' (20 Reel); Total: 73 Reel
sections.rule_applied: Textmatchning med kortbeteckning för varutyp (TL3 vs TESTLINER)
sections.motivation: 'FLUTING' kan identifieras direkt i fakturans rad 1 som 'Fluting' → MATCH. 'TESTLINER' kan INTE identifieras direkt i fakturan — fakturan använder koden 'TL3' på rad 2. TL3 förekommer i samma produktkontext (pappersrulletabell, samma specifikationsformat) som Fluting. Enligt regel 4.3.3.3 (kortbeteckning för varutyp) ger detta MANUAL_REVIEW — sambandet kräver branschkännedom och kan inte avgöras automatiskt. Regel 4.3.5 (generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens) kunde inte tillämpas då certifikatet saknar uttrycklig hänvisningsfras som 'according to attached invoice'.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll av numeriskt värde och enhet
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 187,905 MT/GW (box 7) kan identifieras exakt i fakturans totalrad: '73 Reel 187,905 MT'. Det numeriska värdet 187,905 matchar exakt. Enheten MT matchar. Viktkategori GW i certifikatet — fakturan anger ej explicit GW/NW men har bara ett viktvärde utan motstridande alternativ. Enligt 4.4.2.2 punkt 2 → MATCH.

Certifikatets ursprungsland 'FRANCE' kan identifieras explicit i fakturans fält 'Country of origin: France'. Exakt matchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Ytterligare bekräftas av franskspråkig ursprungsdeklaration och EU preferential origin-uttalande i fakturan.

human_readable_report.overall_conclusion: Fyra av fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Varubeskrivningen kräver manuell granskning på grund av att fakturan använder koden 'TL3' istället för 'TESTLINER'. Rekommendation: manuell handläggning för att bekräfta att TL3 avser Testliner.

output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_check: Checkpoint 4.3 has confidence 0.75 with MANUAL_REVIEW status — confidence floor for IDENTICAL not violated since overall result is MANUAL_REVIEW
output_quality_checks.notes: Checkpoint 4.3 (goods description) returns MANUAL_REVIEW due to rule 4.3.3.3 (TL3 vs TESTLINER). This triggers overall MANUAL_REVIEW. All other checkpoints are MATCH. No MISMATCH found.
